strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Current role involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, matching AI agent requirement
Strong testing/TDD background with workshops, courses, and craftsmanship focus
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in resume
Limited recent Kotlin experience; Java work is older (robotic arms, pre-2018)
Cloud exposure mentions AWS CDK but no clear GCP/Azure or Kubernetes production depth beyond GISCollective

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and limited recent Kotlin/Java

response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with well over the required 6 years, strong TypeScript/Node/React delivery history, and directly relevant current work on AI agents and MCP tooling. Testing discipline and architecture exposure align well with the role's craftsmanship expectations. Gaps are around the specific Nest.js framework and recent Kotlin/Java production work, which are learnable but worth probing.
